problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
